module.name: Dance Training
module.description: A structured training module for high-energy, flow-based, and EDM-inspired dance styles.

dance_breakdance.name: Breakdance
dance_breakdance.description: A high-energy style featuring power moves, spins, freezes, and stalls.

dance_contact_staff_flow.name: Contact Staff Flow
dance_contact_staff_flow.description: Master the art of balance, rolling, and fluid motion with a contact staff.

dance_cutting_shapes.name: Cutting Shapes
dance_cutting_shapes.description: Quick footwork techniques used in tech shuffle and Melbourne shuffle.

dance_dubstep_glitch.name: Dubstep & Glitch Dance
dance_dubstep_glitch.description: Slow-motion, popping, and robotic isolation movement synced with bass music.

dance_fan_dancing.name: Fan Dancing & Silk Flow
dance_fan_dancing.description: Create high-energy visual effects with fans, silk veils, and LED props.

dance_freestyle_rave.name: Freestyle Rave
dance_freestyle_rave.description: Unstructured, highly rhythmic personal dance style for raves.

dance_gloving_tutting.name: Gloving & Tutting
dance_gloving_tutting.description: Beat-synced, intricate finger and hand movements used in EDM dance.

dance_industrial_dance.name: Industrial Dance
dance_industrial_dance.description: Heavy, mechanical, and stomp-based movement inspired by cyber-goth styles.

dance_jumpstyle_hardstyle.name: Jumpstyle & Hardstyle
dance_jumpstyle_hardstyle.description: High-intensity kicks and bounces synchronized to fast beats.

dance_liquid_dance.name: Liquid Dance
dance_liquid_dance.description: Smooth, wave-like movements that create an illusion of continuous motion.

dance_poi_spinning.name: Poi Spinning
dance_poi_spinning.description: A dance flow art focusing on circles, tracers, and rhythmic hand coordination.

dance_breakdance_basic_toprock_moves.name: Basic Toprock Moves
dance_breakdance_basic_toprock_moves.description: Master the foundational steps of breakdancing with proper posture and rhythm.

choices: Immediately deploy side step protocols without further assessment
Conduct a thorough assessment of the situation, then apply side step principles systematically while monitoring for indicators of step side
Delay all action until receiving explicit authorization from higher authority
Apply standard procedures without considering the specific step side factors present
exercises.expectedOutcome: The best approach combines careful assessment with systematic application. In dance technique, movement, and physical expression, impulsive action (option A) and rigid adherence to standard procedures without adaptation (option D) can be dangerous. Waiting for authorization (option C) may cause critical delays. Option B balances thoroughness with action, incorporating awareness of step side while applying side step principles.
hints: Consider the immediate risks and potential consequences of each option.
Think about what information you need before acting.

exercises.prompt: You are preparing a dance sequence that incorporates multiple styles for a live performance. You must decide how to handle a situation involving freeze techniques: core fundamentals. Which approach would be most effective for addressing freeze techniques in this context?

Conduct a thorough assessment of the situation, then apply freeze techniques principles systematically while monitoring for indicators of core fundamentals
Delay all action until receiving explicit authorization from higher authority
Apply standard procedures without considering the specific core fundamentals factors present
exercises.expectedOutcome: The best approach combines careful assessment with systematic application. In dance technique, movement, and physical expression, impulsive action (option A) and rigid adherence to standard procedures without adaptation (option D) can be dangerous. Waiting for authorization (option C) may cause critical delays. Option B balances thoroughness with action, incorporating awareness of core fundamentals while applying freeze techniques principles.
hints: Consider the immediate risks and potential consequences of each option.
Think about what information you need before acting.
